ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the game was played */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Home team score */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Away team score */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "degrees" INTEGER /* Temperature in degrees */,
  "wind" INTEGER /* Wind speed */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity */,
  "roof" TEXT /* Type of roof (e.g., outdoors, dome) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "team_alias" TEXT /* Alias of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current coach */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Stadium capacity */,
  "built_year" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was built */,
  "stadium_type" TEXT /* Type of stadium (e.g., football, multi-purpose) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "degrees" INTEGER /* Temperature in degrees */,
  "wind" INTEGER /* Wind speed */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity */,
  "roof" TEXT /* Type of roof (e.g., outdoors, dome) */,
  "precipitation" INTEGER /* Amount of precipitation */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition (e.g., sunny, rainy) */,
  "visibility" INTEGER /* Visibility in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_conditions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game outcome */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Home team score */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Away team score */,
  "winner" TEXT /* Winner of the game */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the game went into overtime */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_outcomes_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "status" TEXT /* Player's status (e.g., active, injured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is on */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Player's height */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_position" INTEGER /* Position in the draft */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "first_downs" INTEGER /* Number of first downs */,
  "num_rushes" INTEGER /* Number of rushes */,
  "rush_yards" INTEGER /* Rushing yards */,
  "rush_tds" INTEGER /* Rushing touchdowns */,
  "pass_comp" INTEGER /* Number of passes completed */,
  "pass_att" INTEGER /* Number of passes attempted */,
  "pass_yards" INTEGER /* Passing yards */,
  "pass_tds" INTEGER /* Passing touchdowns */,
  "pass_ints" INTEGER /* Passing interceptions */,
  "third_down_conversions" INTEGER /* Number of third-down conversions */,
  "fourth_down_conversions" INTEGER /* Number of fourth-down conversions */,
  "time_of_possession" INTEGER /* Time of possession in minutes */,
  "penalties_committed" TEXT /* Number of penalties committed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sacks" (
  "sack_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sack */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "sacks_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of sacks allowed */,
  "sacks_yards_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of yards allowed due to sacks */,
  "sacks_forced" INTEGER /* Number of sacks forced by the defense */,
  "sacks_allowed_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of sacks allowed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sack_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sacks_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sacks_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "net_pass_yards" (
  "net_pass_yard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each net passing yard */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "net_pass_yards" INTEGER /* Net passing yards */,
  "interceptions_thrown" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions thrown */,
  "completions_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of passes completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("net_pass_yard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_net_pass_yards_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_net_pass_yards_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_yards" (
  "total_yard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each total yard */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "total_yards" INTEGER /* Total yards */,
  "plays" INTEGER /* Total number of plays */,
  "average_yards_per_play" REAL /* Average yards per play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("total_yard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_yards_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_yards_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fumbles" (
  "fumble_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fumble */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles */,
  "fumbles_lost" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles lost */,
  "forced_fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles forced by the defense */,
  "fumbles_recovered" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles recovered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fumble_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fumbles_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fumbles_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "num_penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties */,
  "penalty_yards" INTEGER /* Number of penalty yards */,
  "penalties_accepted" INTEGER /* Number of penalties accepted */,
  "penalties_declined" INTEGER /* Number of penalties declined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is on */,
  "coaching_since" INTEGER /* Year the coach started coaching */,
  "coaching_record" TEXT /* Coaching record (e.g., 100-50-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., owner, coach, analyst, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
